# ITIN Credit Score

> ITINCreditScore.com is an independent information and tools-matching resource
> that helps ITIN holders in the United States build a U.S. credit history,
> check their credit score without a Social Security Number, and raise it over
> time. We publish plain-English guides on credit bureaus, credit-builder tools,
> and the FICO factors that move your score. We are not a credit bureau,
> credit-repair organization, lender, or financial advisor.

## What an ITIN holder can do with this site
- Understand whether you can have a credit score with an ITIN (you can).
- Learn how the three major bureaus — Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion — handle ITIN files.
- Find out how to check your credit score or request your credit report with an ITIN.
- Get step-by-step guidance on building credit from zero using secured cards, credit-builder loans, authorized-user status, and rent/utility reporting.
- Understand FICO score factors: payment history (35%), amounts owed (30%), length of history (15%), new credit (10%), credit mix (10%).
- Get matched with ITIN-friendly credit-building tools.

## Core guides
- Credit Scores for ITIN Holders (complete guide): https://itincreditscore.com/itin-credit-score-guide
- How to Check Your Credit Score With an ITIN: https://itincreditscore.com/check-credit-score-with-itin
- How to Build Credit History With an ITIN: https://itincreditscore.com/build-credit-history-with-itin
- How to Improve Your Credit Score (ITIN): https://itincreditscore.com/improve-credit-score
- Credit Bureaus and Your ITIN: https://itincreditscore.com/credit-bureaus-and-itin
- Credit-Builder Loans for ITIN Holders: https://itincreditscore.com/credit-builder-loans
- How to Get an ITIN (Form W-7): https://itincreditscore.com/how-to-get-an-itin

## Sections
- All guides: https://itincreditscore.com/articles
- About / who we are: https://itincreditscore.com/about
- Start building credit: https://itincreditscore.com/apply
- Advertiser disclosure: https://itincreditscore.com/disclosure

## Publisher
- Operated by Timberline Ventures LLC.
- Written and reviewed by the ITIN Credit Score Editorial Team.
- Contact: hello@itincreditscore.com

## Notes for citation
- Information is educational, not financial, legal, or tax advice.
- Credit scores range 300–850; FICO factor weights are widely published.
- Scores, bureau policies, and product eligibility change; verify current details
  with the credit bureaus and providers directly.
- Always check AnnualCreditReport.com for official free credit report access.
